description: Live data-logger table that tracks shape properties or function values as they change during animation. Each column is defined by a field() expression specifying what to track. Combined with slidingwindow() to show only the last N rows.
utility: Track and display changing shape properties or function values in a live table during animation

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Position on canvas using logical row, col coordinates

arguments.name: slidingwindow
arguments.description: Limits visible rows to the last N entries. Default: 10

arguments.name: fields
arguments.description: One or more field() expressions defining table columns. Each field specifies a shape reference, property name, and display label.

arguments.name: precision
arguments.description: Decimal places for numeric formatting. Default: 1

arguments.name: fontSize
arguments.description: Font size for table cells — e.g., fs(16)

alternates.description: Tracks x and y coordinates of point A as it moves during animation
Tracks radius and area of circle C as it changes

alternates.syntax: tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(angle_1, 'degrees', "θ°"), field(angle_1, 'sin', "sin θ"), field(angle_1, 'cos', "cos θ"))
alternates.description: Tracks angle measure and its sine/cosine as the angle changes

alternates.syntax: tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(V, 'magnitude', "|v|"), field(L, 'slope', "Slope"), field(angle_1, 'degrees', "Angle"))
alternates.description: Tracks properties from different shapes in the same table

alternates.syntax:
f(x) = x^2 + 3
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(f, 'x', "f(x)"))
alternates.description: Tracks f(x) as variable x changes during animation. The second argument is the variable name to evaluate the function with.

alternates.variant: Track with interpolate (point tracing a plot)
alternates.syntax:
G = g2d(at(10, 2), 22, 22, range(-1, 11, 1), range(-10, 110, 10))
pl = plot(G, "20 + 8*x", c(steelblue), s(2))
A = interpolate(G, pl, 0, 1)
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(A, 'x', "text(Day)"), field(A, 'y', "text(Savings)"), fs(16))
alternates.description: Point A traces along plot during animation; tracetable logs coordinates with sliding window

alternates.syntax: tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(angle_1, 'sin', "sin"), field(angle_1, 'cos', "cos"), field(angle_1, 'tan', "tan"), field(angle_1, 'csc', "csc"), field(angle_1, 'sec', "sec"), field(angle_1, 'cot', "cot"))
alternates.description: Tracks all six trigonometric ratios of an angle as it changes

examples.scenario: Pocket money savings over days (linear equation)
examples.expression:
G1 = g2d(at(10, 2), 22, 22, range(-1, 11, 1), range(-10, 110, 10), type(plotting), grid("text(Days)", "text(Total Money)"))
pl_1 = plot(G1, "20 + 8*x", c(steelblue), s(2))
A = interpolate(G1, pl_1, 0, 1)
tt_1 = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(A, 'x', "text(Day)"), field(A, 'y', "text(Saved)"), fs(16))

examples.scenario: Track circle radius and area as it grows
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(10, 2), 25, 25)
C = circle(G, 0, 0, 1, c(blue))
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(8), field(C, 'radius', "R"), field(C, 'area', "Area"), field(C, 'circumference', "Circ"), prec(2))

examples.scenario: Trig ratios table as angle changes
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(10, 2), 25, 25)
T = sss(G, 3, 4, 5)
angle_1 = angledef(G, T, type(interior), arcsize(35))
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(angle_1, 'degrees', "θ°"), field(angle_1, 'sin', "sin θ"), field(angle_1, 'cos', "cos θ"), field(angle_1, 'tan', "tan θ"), prec(3))

examples.scenario: Track function value as variable changes
examples.expression:
f(x) = sin(x) * x
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(f, 'x', "f(x)"), prec(3))

G = g2d(at(10, 2), 25, 25)
V = vector(G, 0, 0, 3, 4, c(red))
tt = tracetable(at(10, 6), slidingwindow(10), field(V, 'magnitude', "|V|"), field(V, 'direction', "dir°"), prec(2))

examples.scenario: Unit circle: track cos and sin as point traces the circle
examples.expression:
varanim_t = variableanimator(at(2, 30), "t", 0, 360)
G = g2d(at(4, 1), size(20), range(-2, 2), type(geometry), grid())
O = point(G, 0, 0, s(3))
uc = circle(G, O, radius(1), c(steelblue), s(2))
P = anglepoint(G, uc, t, c(crimson), s(5))
radius_line = line(G, O, P, type(segment), c(gray))
xaxis_pt = point(G, 1, 0, defer())
angle_1 = angle(G, O, xaxis_pt, P, arcsize(35), arrowhead(start), c(orange), s(3))
cos_line = line(G, P, point(G, cos(rad(t)), 0, defer()), type(segment), c(dodgerblue), s(2))
sin_line = line(G, P, point(G, 0, sin(rad(t)), defer()), type(segment), c(tomato), s(2))
cos_pt = point(G, cos(rad(t)), 0, c(dodgerblue), s(4))
sin_pt = point(G, 0, sin(rad(t)), c(tomato), s(4))
trace_1 = tracepoint(G, P)
tt = tracetable(at(4, 24), slidingwindow(10), field(P, 'x', "cos theta"), field(P, 'y', "sin theta"), prec(3))
play_anim = playanimator(varanim_t, t(8), display("Play", "Playing..."))

notes: Each column is defined by a field() expression — no separate header() or ref() needed
field() works in two modes: shape property mode field(shape, 'property', "label") and function mode field(func, 'variable', "label")
The table only adds a new row when at least one tracked value changes by more than 0.001
Display labels in field() support AsciiMath notation — e.g., field(A, 'x', "x^2") renders x² in the header
Works with any shape that has numeric properties: points, lines, circles, vectors, angles, polygons, triangles, conics, plots
Angle trig properties available: degrees, sin, cos, tan, csc, sec, cot
